old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.4.1","title":"Normalize link context lock failure semantics","description":"Review during 2auf.35.4 found several pre-existing link_ctx APIs discard seq_unlock or mutex-destroy errors, while cleanup documentation mixes single-owner semantics with claims about synchronized cleanup. Audit next_tx, set_epoch, cleanup, and public docs; return/log failures consistently without creating ambiguous partially successful operations.","acceptance_criteria":"Lock/unlock/destroy failure behavior is explicit and tested on POSIX fault-injection paths; cleanup contract is internally consistent; no key or nonce state is silently reported successful after synchronization failure; three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T15:22:54.601359Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T15:22:54.601359Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.4.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T15:42:21.10716Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
